name: Maurice Andrés
abstract: Maurice André (21 May 1933 – 25 February 2012) was a French trumpeter, active in the classical music field. He was professor of trumpet at the Conservatoire National Supérieur de Musique in Paris where he introduced the teaching of the piccolo trumpet including the Baroque repertoire on trumpet.

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Candoli
about_quotes.evidence: And in there they had trumpet players from South America, Maurice Andre of France that performed with the Philharmonic... I saw a tape of what he did with the Philharmonic, and he and Maurice Andre, he did piccolo trumpet
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Candoli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
